# Paraspur.com - Complete Local Guide for Paraspur, Gonda, Uttar Pradesh

## About This Site

Paraspur.com is the official community directory for Paraspur Block in Gonda District, Uttar Pradesh, India.
It covers schools, hospitals, colleges, temples, businesses, markets, politicians, and all 91 villages of Paraspur Block.

**Contact:** admin@veerexa.com
**Location:** Paraspur, Gonda, Uttar Pradesh - PIN 271504
**Sitemap:** https://paraspur.com/sitemap.xml

---

## Key Pages & Content

### Community Directory
- Schools in Paraspur: https://paraspur.com/directory/schools.html
- Hospitals in Paraspur: https://paraspur.com/directory/hospitals.html
- Colleges in Paraspur: https://paraspur.com/directory/colleges.html
- Temples & Tourism: https://paraspur.com/directory/temples.html
- Banks in Paraspur: https://paraspur.com/directory/banks.html
- Libraries: https://paraspur.com/directory/libraries.html
- Businesses & Shops: https://paraspur.com/directory/businesses.html
- Jobs in Paraspur: https://paraspur.com/directory/jobs.html

### Local Market & Commerce
- Paraspur Market (Bazar) - Full shop directory: https://paraspur.com/paraspur-market.html
- Restaurants & Food Corners: https://paraspur.com/directory/restaurants-paraspur.html
- Clothing & Fashion Shops: https://paraspur.com/directory/clothing-shops-paraspur.html

- Local Startups & Innovation Platform: https://paraspur.com/directory/local-startups.html

### Villages Directory (91 Villages)
- Villages Index: https://paraspur.com/villages/index.html
- All individual villages listed at: https://paraspur.com/villages/[village-name].html

---

## Quick Facts About Paraspur

- **Block:** Paraspur Block
- **District:** Gonda, Uttar Pradesh
- **PIN Code:** 271504
- **Total Villages:** 91
- **Key Crops:** Wheat, Rice, Sugarcane, Mustard
- **Major Market:** Paraspur Bazar (Main Chauraha, Colonelganj Road)
- **Historical Note:** Paraspur has a connection to Saint Tulsidas, the author of Ramcharitmanas

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is the PIN code of Paraspur?**
A: The PIN code of Paraspur, Gonda is 271504.

**Q: How many villages are in Paraspur Block?**
A: There are 91 villages in Paraspur Block, Gonda district.

**Q: What are the best schools in Paraspur?**
A: Top schools include Swami Leela Shah Convent, Shanti Devi Kamta Prasad Inter College, and Saraswati Vidya Mandir. Full list at https://paraspur.com/directory/schools.html

**Q: Where is Paraspur located?**
A: Paraspur is a block and town in Gonda district, Uttar Pradesh, India, located near the Bahraich border.

**Q: What are the popular restaurants in Paraspur?**
A: Popular food places include J.P. Palace Restaurant, Kalika Haveli, 2nd Wife Musical Restaurant, and Alok Misthan Bhandar.

**Q: What are the best shops in Paraspur market?**
A: Paraspur market has Ram Gopal Kirana Store, Rajshree Electronics, Pardeep Jewellers, IFFCO Bazaar (fertilizer), and Jaiswal Garments among many others. Full list at https://paraspur.com/paraspur-market.html

---
